title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Looker integration, focusing on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for grounding agents in enterprise data. The video covers MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, API credential setup, and building a functional agent that translates prompts into Looker data requests.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building an AI agent with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) connected to Looker, using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to ground the agent in enterprise data. The demonstration covers the MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, and API credential setup. The result is a working agent that translates natural language prompts into Looker data requests.
